instruction: Create a WidgetKit widget for iOS 26 with an interactive toggle that updates the widget state in real time using App Intents.
Build a Live Activity for iOS 26 that presents a multi-stage Dynamic Island experience for a delivery app, showing order status, driver location, and arrival countdown.
Demonstrate a WidgetKit widget that fetches and displays real-time weather data using App Intents and URLSession background tasks.
Create a WidgetKit widget for iOS 26 that lets users select a favorite emoji using App Intents and updates the widget in real time.
Build a WidgetKit widget for iOS 26 that displays a list of upcoming calendar events and supports deep linking into the main app using App Intents.
